name: MQTT Connection and Telemetry
description: Broker connection, topic subscription, disconnect flow, and first telemetry.

lessons.name: Connect, Subscribe, Publish, Disconnect
lessons.description: Use MicroPython to connect to the broker, subscribe to a topic, exchange messages, and disconnect cleanly.
lessons.template:
from umqtt.simple import MQTTClient

# Fill in your MQTT settings here
client = MQTTClient(client_id=b"student-device", server="broker.emqx.io")

# Connect, publish, subscribe, and disconnect here

lessons.name: First Sensor Publish
lessons.description: Publish sensor data every two seconds as JSON with backend-friendly metadata.
lessons.template: # Read a sensor and publish JSON telemetry every 2 seconds

name: Remote Device Control
description: Control visible hardware outputs through MQTT and report their actual state.

lessons.name: LED Command Listener
lessons.description: Subscribe to a command topic and toggle an LED from incoming JSON.
lessons.template: # Subscribe to LED commands and publish resulting LED state

lessons.name: Servo Control Basics
lessons.description: Move a servo to a requested angle from a JSON command and report the actual position.
lessons.template: # Parse angle command, move servo, and publish the state

name: Integrated Device Logic
description: Combine telemetry, backend-friendly metadata, and local automation into realistic labs.

lessons.name: Threshold Rule on the Device
lessons.description: React locally to a sensor threshold crossing using LED or servo output while still reporting telemetry.
